notes: Reels are referenced via their public Instagram URLs (no direct .mp4 download).
Each reel uses the official Instagram embed URL on the landing page.
Local .jpg files in /videos/posts/ are used as poster / cover frames in the gallery.
Cover frames for unused reels (eid_mubarak, peanut_butter) are kept on disk for future use.
